word: H6014 - עָמַר - ʻâmar - aw-mar' - Bind sheaves

sections.paragraph:
Original: עמר

Transliteration: ‛âmar

Phonetic: aw-mar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to bind sheaves
    1. (Piel) to gather
  2. to manipulate, deal tyrannically with
    1. (Hithpael) to treat as a slave

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1645,1646

Part(s) of speech: Verb
